channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18713] sanity-compr test_27M: (13) pool found: test_27Ia
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/911306ae-d699-4476-b2d0-6992302e846a

test_27M failed with the following error:

== sanity test 27M: test O_APPEND striping =============== 23:02:35 (1739228555)
striped dir -i3 -c2 -H crush /mnt/lustre/d27M.sanity
CMD: trevis-81vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_pool
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_pool=LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*
trevis-81vm6: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdd/lustre-MDT0000/append_pool=LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*: Invalid argument
trevis-81vm6: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdd/lustre-MDT0002/append_pool=LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*: Invalid argument
trevis-81vm6: error: set_param: setting 'mdd/*/append_pool'='LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*': Invalid argument
pdsh@trevis-81vm1: trevis-81vm6: ssh exited with exit code 22
trevis-81vm7: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdd/lustre-MDT0001/append_pool=LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*: Invalid argument
trevis-81vm7: error: set_param: setting /sys/fs/lustre/mdd/lustre-MDT0003/append_pool=LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*: Invalid argument
trevis-81vm7: error: set_param: setting 'mdd/*/append_pool'='LOV_MAXPOOLNAME*': Invalid argument
pdsh@trevis-81vm1: trevis-81vm7: ssh exited with exit code 22
CMD: trevis-81vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_stripe_count
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_stripe_count=0
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_stripe_count=2
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_stripe_count=2
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_stripe_count=2
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_stripe_count=2
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_stripe_count=2
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_stripe_count=-1
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_stripe_count=-1
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_stripe_count=-1
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_stripe_count=-1
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_stripe_count=-1
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_stripe_count=1
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_stripe_count=1
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_stripe_count=1
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_stripe_count=1
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_stripe_count=1
Creating new pool test_27M
CMD: trevis-81vm6 lctl pool_new lustre.test_27M
trevis-81vm6: Pool lustre.test_27M created
CMD: trevis-81vm6 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pools.test_27M 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-81vm7 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0001-mdtlov.pools.test_27M 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-81vm6 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0002-mdtlov.pools.test_27M 				2>/dev/null || echo foo
CMD: trevis-81vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.test_27M 		2>/dev/null || echo foo
Adding targets to pool
CMD: trevis-81vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl pool_add lustre.test_27M lustre-OST[0000-0001/1]
trevis-81vm6: OST lustre-OST0000_UUID added to pool lustre.test_27M
trevis-81vm6: OST lustre-OST0001_UUID added to pool lustre.test_27M
CMD: trevis-81vm6 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0000-mdtlov.pools.test_27M |
				grep -e lustre-OST0000_UUID -e lustre-OST0001_UUID  | sort -u | tr '\n' ' '
CMD: trevis-81vm7 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0001-mdtlov.pools.test_27M |
				grep -e lustre-OST0000_UUID -e lustre-OST0001_UUID  | sort -u | tr '\n' ' '
CMD: trevis-81vm6 lctl get_param -n lod.lustre-MDT0002-mdtlov.pools.test_27M |
				grep -e lustre-OST0000_UUID -e lustre-OST0001_UUID  | sort -u | tr '\n' ' '
CMD: trevis-81vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com lctl get_param -n lov.lustre-*.pools.test_27M |
			grep -e lustre-OST0000_UUID -e lustre-OST0001_UUID  | sort -u | tr '\n' ' ' 
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_pool=test_27M
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_pool=test_27M
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_pool=test_27M
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_pool=test_27M
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_pool=test_27M
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_stripe_count=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_stripe_count=0
CMD: trevis-81vm6,trevis-81vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.append_pool=none
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.append_pool=none
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.append_pool=none
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.append_pool=none
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.append_pool=none
 sanity test_27M: @@@@@@ FAIL: (13) pool found: test_27Ia

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/110691 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/110691 - 4.18.0-553.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-compr test_27M - (13) pool found: test_27Ia

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58230
Subject: LU-18713 tests: restore $MOUNT in sanity/27Ia
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: dfaab3e7478737ac94f6ee3a3d5cbb93f3764ae0
